---
pagetitle: "State Space Models — a guide to structured memory and complex dynamics in deep learning"
description: "A guide to structured memory and complex dynamics in deep learning."
page-layout: full
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="ssm-landing">

  <div class="ssm-hero">

    <div class="ssm-cover-frame">
      <img class="ssm-cover-img"
           src="cover/front_cover_web.png"
           alt="Front cover of the book State Space Models: the title in orange above an abstract spiral motif."
           width="460" height="599" />
    </div>

    <div class="ssm-hero-text">
      <div class="ssm-title" role="heading" aria-level="1">State Space Models</div>
      <p class="ssm-subtitle">A guide to structured memory and complex dynamics in deep learning</p>
      <p class="ssm-edition">Open Edition &middot; 2026</p>

      <div class="ssm-actions">
        <a class="ssm-btn ssm-btn-primary" href="chapters/01-introduction/index.html">Start reading</a>
        <a class="ssm-btn ssm-btn-ghost" href="https://github.com/CosmoNaught/ssm.guide" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a>
      </div>

      <p class="ssm-doi">
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20736327" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img src="https://zenodo.org/badge/DOI/10.5281/zenodo.20736327.svg" alt="DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20736327"></a>
      </p>
    </div>

  </div>

  <section class="ssm-section ssm-changelog-section" aria-labelledby="ssm-changelog-heading">
    <h2 class="ssm-section-heading" id="ssm-changelog-heading">Changelog</h2>
    <ul class="ssm-changelog">
      <li class="ssm-changelog-item">
        <span class="ssm-changelog-date">[Jun 2026]</span>
        <span class="ssm-changelog-body">First public preview. Foundations and Structured State Spaces &amp; S4 chapters available.</span>
      </li>
    </ul>
  </section>

  <section class="ssm-section ssm-authors-section" aria-labelledby="ssm-authors-heading">
    <h2 class="ssm-section-heading ssm-section-heading-orange" id="ssm-authors-heading">Authors</h2>
    <div class="ssm-authors">
      <div class="ssm-author">
        <a class="ssm-author-photo-link"
           href="https://cosmonaught.github.io/cosmosantoni/"
           target="_blank" rel="noopener"
           aria-label="Cosmo Santoni — personal website">
          <img class="ssm-author-photo" src="misc/cosmo.jpeg" alt="Headshot of Cosmo Santoni." width="96" height="96" />
        </a>
        <div class="ssm-author-meta">
          <a class="ssm-author-name" href="https://cosmonaught.github.io/cosmosantoni/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Cosmo Santoni</a>
          <span class="ssm-author-affiliation">Imperial College London</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="ssm-section" aria-labelledby="ssm-cite-heading">
    <h2 class="ssm-section-heading" id="ssm-cite-heading">Cite this book</h2>
    <pre class="ssm-bibtex"><code>@book{santoni2026ssm,
  author = {Santoni, Cosmo},
  title  = {State Space Models: A guide to structured memory and complex dynamics in deep learning},
  year   = {2026},
  note   = {Open Edition},
  doi    = {10.5281/zenodo.20736327},
  url    = {https://ssm.guide}
}</code></pre>
  </section>

  <section class="ssm-section" aria-labelledby="ssm-toc-heading">
    <h2 class="ssm-section-heading" id="ssm-toc-heading">Table of contents</h2>
    <div class="ssm-toc">
      <ul class="ssm-toc-front">
        <li><a href="chapters/00-front/preface.html">Preface</a></li>
        <li><a href="chapters/00-front/reader-guide.html">Reader&rsquo;s Guide</a></li>
        <li><a href="chapters/00-front/notation.html">Notation &amp; Preliminaries</a></li>
        <li><a href="chapters/00-front/roadmap.html">Roadmap &amp; Contributing</a></li>
      </ul>
      <ul class="ssm-toc-chapters">
        <li class="ssm-toc-ch"><a href="chapters/01-introduction/index.html"><span class="ssm-toc-num">1</span> Introduction</a></li>
        <li class="ssm-toc-ch"><a href="chapters/02-foundations/01-state-as-memory.html"><span class="ssm-toc-num">2</span> State as Memory</a></li>
        <li class="ssm-toc-ch"><a href="chapters/02-foundations/02-continuous-time.html"><span class="ssm-toc-num">3</span> Continuous-Time Linear State Spaces</a></li>
        <li class="ssm-toc-ch"><a href="chapters/02-foundations/03-discretisation.html"><span class="ssm-toc-num">4</span> Discretisation</a></li>
        <li class="ssm-toc-ch"><a href="chapters/02-foundations/04-recurrence-convolution-toeplitz.html"><span class="ssm-toc-num">5</span> Recurrence, Convolution, and Toeplitz Maps</a></li>
        <li class="ssm-toc-ch"><a href="chapters/02-foundations/05-transfer-functions.html"><span class="ssm-toc-num">6</span> Transfer Functions and Kernel Generation</a></li>
        <li class="ssm-toc-ch"><a href="chapters/03-s4/06-memory-problem.html"><span class="ssm-toc-num">7</span> The Memory Problem</a></li>
        <li class="ssm-toc-ch"><a href="chapters/03-s4/07-hippo.html"><span class="ssm-toc-num">8</span> HiPPO</a></li>
        <li class="ssm-toc-ch"><a href="chapters/03-s4/08-structured-state-matrices.html"><span class="ssm-toc-num">9</span> Structured State Matrices</a></li>
        <li class="ssm-toc-ch"><a href="chapters/03-s4/09-s4-kernel-algorithm.html"><span class="ssm-toc-num">10</span> The S4 Kernel Algorithm</a></li>
        <li class="ssm-toc-ch"><a href="chapters/03-s4/10-diagonal-state-spaces.html"><span class="ssm-toc-num">11</span> Diagonal State Spaces: DSS, S4D, and S5</a></li>
      </ul>
      <ul class="ssm-toc-back">
        <li><a href="chapters/references.html">References</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </section>

</section>
```
